visual_features.overall_style: Clean, corporate marketing site with a modern full-width hero. Strong brand color, simple geometry, high-contrast typography, and minimal decorative elements beyond the technical background imagery.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by size, contrast, and positioning: (1) Top horizontal bar with logo and navigation in a solid teal band; (2) Large, all-caps white hero headline centered in the viewport; (3) Small blue category pill above the title; (4) Post meta row (author, date, comments) beneath the title with smaller text and icons. Background hero image is visually rich but dimmed so it remains subordinate to the headline.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Hero copy is given generous vertical padding and centered alignment, creating a clear focus zone in the middle of the screen. Navigation items are evenly spaced with sufficient horizontal padding for a calm, uncluttered header. No tight crowding; content elements breathe despite the detailed background image.
unique_elements: Technical geotechnical cross‑section graphic used as full-width hero background
Strong, uninterrupted teal header bar spanning full width
Small centered category label pill (JEOPROBE) above the post title, reinforcing brand color and hierarchy
All-caps, multi-line hero title that dominates central viewport overlaid on an engineering diagram

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implied 12‑column responsive grid (typical WordPress/corporate layout) with a full-width container for the hero and a centered content column.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width fixed header with centered horizontal navigation, followed by a full-bleed hero section where copy is centered both horizontally and vertically over a background image.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top persistent navigation bar → immediate hero/article header section with background image → (implied) scroll-down to body content and other sections, likely in a standard top-to-bottom stacking of content blocks.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Header content (logo left, nav right) aligned to a central max-width container; hero content strictly center-aligned. Text in hero is fully centered, forming a strong vertical axis on the page.
responsive_hints: Full-width hero image suggests responsive background scaling via CSS background-size: cover.
Centered headline and meta text will collapse gracefully on smaller viewports.
Horizontal navigation likely collapses into a mobile menu (hamburger) at smaller breakpoints, given the number of menu items.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: a fixed-height teal header with logo on the left and navigation links on the right, followed by a full-width hero background image. Inside the hero, content is stacked and center-aligned: a compact category pill at top, a large multi-line headline, then a smaller row of post metadata with an avatar icon, date, and comments count on a single line.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header bar occupies roughly 10–15% of the vertical viewport. The hero section dominates the remaining viewport height, with headline and meta content clustered in the central 40–60% of the vertical space. Lateral margins within the content column protect text from screen edges, while the hero image extends edge-to-edge.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderately spacious hero layout: few elements with large typography and generous padding, balanced against a visually dense technical background image. Navigation bar is orderly and not crowded, indicating a preference for comfortable reading and scanning rather than maximal information density.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primary flow follows a classic F/Z hybrid: eye lands on the logo at top-left, sweeps across the navigation items, then drops to the centered category label and large headline, before moving down to the meta information. The high-contrast white title and its central placement override the busy background and anchor attention in the mid-screen area.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Buttons (as seen in the JEOPROBE category pill) appear as small rectangular/rounded-rectangle shapes with approximately 4px corner radius. Solid teal fill (#00789B) with white, uppercase sans-serif text. No visible heavy shadow; flat or very subtle elevation, aligned to the flat-design aesthetic. Padding looks around 8–12px horizontally and 4–6px vertically, resulting in compact, badge-like elements.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Most likely implemented as either <a> anchors styled as buttons or <button> elements, often with a single text node. Category/button badges would be simple inline-block elements within the hero content stack. Primary CTA buttons elsewhere would follow the same structure, possibly with an optional <i> or <span> icon.

ui_patterns.visual_description: While not visible directly, article/blog cards are likely used in listings: rectangular containers with light background (#FFFFFF) on a contrasting neutral (#F5F5F5), soft 2–4px border radius, subtle shadow (e.g., 0 1–3px 4–8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)) or a 1px light border for separation, internal padding around 16–24px. Typical treatment would emphasize title and perhaps a thumbnail image or category badge.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected structure: a wrapping <article> or <div> per card, containing optional <figure> for thumbnail, heading (<h2>/<h3>) for title, a meta section (date, author) and an excerpt paragraph. Cards likely arranged in a responsive flex or grid layout with equal-width columns at desktop and stacked vertically on mobile.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Contact or subscription forms would align with the clean corporate style: full-width input fields with 2–4px radius corners, light border (#E0E0E0–#CCCCCC), ample vertical spacing (8–16px) between fields, and labels either above the inputs or as placeholders. Submit button likely uses the same teal style as the category pill, with white text. Validation feedback probably uses small text in red and possibly a colored border state.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Forms likely follow a stacked layout: label element above each input/textarea, grouped in a single column inside a <form>. Inputs (<input>, <textarea>, <select>) sit within block-level wrappers (e.g., .form-group). Submit actions are plain buttons or anchor-styled-as-button aligned left or centered at the bottom of the form.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Top navigation is a horizontal bar with a solid teal background (#00789B). Logo on the left combines a geometric icon with 'JEOPROBE' wordmark (green 'JEO' and white 'PROBE'). Menu items ('Inicio', 'Nosotras', etc.) are right-aligned, set in white sans-serif text, evenly spaced with around 24–32px horizontal padding between links. Active or hovered states likely change text color (e.g., to the lime accent) or add a subtle underline or bottom border for indication.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Standard semantic navigation: <header> containing a <nav> with an unordered list <ul>. Each menu item is an <li> containing an <a>. Responsive behavior probably uses a mobile toggle (hamburger) that switches this to a vertical stacked menu or overlay beneath the header at smaller widths.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Lists of posts or services are likely visually separated into either cards or simple stacked rows with clear heading text, short descriptions, and optional small icons/thumbnails. Spacing is moderate, with consistent vertical margins (12–20px) between list items to keep scanning easy. Dividers may be subtle 1px lines in a light grey (#E0E0E0) or simply whitespace-based separation.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: HTML likely uses <ul>/<ol> or repeated <article>/<div> blocks arranged via flexbox. When thumbnails are present, they would be left-aligned with text to the right (media object pattern) or above the text in a vertical stack on smaller screens.

heading.visual_style: Bold geometric/grotesque sans-serif with high x-height, uniform strokes, and clean, modern appearance. The hero title is all-caps with tight but readable letter-spacing and a strong, blocky presence.

body.visual_style: Neutral, clean sans-serif optimized for readability, likely a humanist or slightly grotesque style with open counters and moderate x-height.

spacing_system.component_padding: Common internal padding around 16–24px for blocks (cards, hero text container, navigation inner container) using multiples of the 8px base.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections of approximately 48–64px, maintaining a spacious, corporate feel.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change color (e.g., from white to lime or lighter teal) and/or show an underline/bottom border on hover, with a slightly darker teal background on active states.
Buttons probably use a simple color darkening or lightening on hover and focus, with transition: all 150–200ms ease-in-out to feel responsive yet subtle.
Category pill and other interactive labels may have slight hover elevation or background tint change, possibly combined with cursor change to pointer.
Hero image may be static, but smooth scrolling between sections and gentle fade-in of content on scroll would fit the visual style without feeling overstated.
